# Tianyuan Waterproof (TY-SHIELD™)

Professional manufacturer and global supplier of high-quality waterproofing materials.

## Core Products
- Bitumen Waterproofing Membranes (SBS/APP)
- Polymer Membranes (PVC, TPO, HDPE)
- Waterproof Coatings (Polyurethane)
- Self-Adhesive Waterproofing Tapes
- Asphalt Roofing Shingles
